conflicts.chosen_protocol: paper_exact blocked until exact LMDB is generated; code_exact kept separate
conflicts.code_behavior: Official finetune_main.py consumes processed LMDB via datasets/physio_dataset.py; default CLI points to MentalArithmetic path.
conflicts.expected_impact: Large; split/preprocessing mismatch can dominate metrics.
conflicts.paper_claim: Paper protocol uses raw PhysioNet-MI 64 channels, 200Hz, 4s, subject 1-70/71-89/90-109 split.
conflicts.reason: LMDB contents are opaque unless regenerated/audited.

conflicts.chosen_protocol: paper_exact blocked until exact LMDB is generated; hybrid forward smoke not scored
conflicts.code_behavior: Official dataset class consumes LMDB; repository default CLI is not BCIC-IV-2a.
conflicts.expected_impact: Large; exact paper comparison invalid without exact preprocessing.
conflicts.paper_claim: Paper E.9 uses [2,6]s, 0.3-40Hz, 200Hz, subjects 1-5 train, 6-7 val, 8-9 test.
conflicts.reason: Existing SAS-Cert loader uses different bandpass in prior MVE and frozen pooling.

conflicts.code_behavior: No matching key-ingredients implementation found in the clean official entrypoint.
conflicts.expected_impact: Large; paper target is much higher and depends on ingredients.
conflicts.paper_claim: LOSO result requires EA, session statistics, Mixup, and subject-wise regularization.
conflicts.reason: Running plain LOSO would not reproduce the paper table.

conflicts.code_behavior: README command only shows BNCI2014004; README states code for other datasets will be released.
conflicts.expected_impact: Blocking; any local adapter is hybrid/paper reconstruction, not code exact.
conflicts.paper_claim: Paper reports BNCI2014001 2-class with 8-30Hz, 250Hz, 45-channel template, EA, 30% target fine-tune.
conflicts.reason: Cannot call official default for BNCI2014001 without inventing missing data pipeline.

conflicts.code_behavior: dataset.py has a BNCI2014001-4 branch but expects ./data/BNCI2014001/X.npy and labels.npy; local files absent.
conflicts.paper_claim: Paper reports BNCI2014001 full 4-class with 45-channel template and EA.
conflicts.reason: Direct 22-channel BCIC input would violate paper and code expectations.

conflicts.chosen_protocol: record missing dependency; no global install
conflicts.code_behavior: Local environment lacks wandb/einops; model PatchEmbedding defaults to num_channels=45.
conflicts.expected_impact: Blocking for code execution; high risk if bypassed.
conflicts.paper_claim: Paper preprocessing includes 45-channel template and EA.
conflicts.reason: Attachment forbids global pollution; adapter must preserve 45 channels.

protocols.notes: Official entry defaults are code behavior; requires LMDB datasets_dir with train/val/test keys.

protocols.entrypoint: paper raw EDF preprocessing + CBraMod full finetune
protocols.notes: Raw EDF split 1-70/71-89/90-109 must be converted to exact LMDB before exact run.
Can forward with 22-channel mapping, but this is not paper exact because paper uses 64 channels.
Official code uses LMDB dataset class; default CLI is not BCIC.

protocols.entrypoint: paper raw MAT preprocessing + CBraMod full finetune
protocols.notes: Need exact [2,6]s, 0.3-40Hz, 200Hz, 1-5/6-7/8-9 split before exact run.

protocols.entrypoint: Step1 raw MAT loader + CBraMod forward smoke
protocols.notes: Forward works, but not full fine-tuning reproduction.
README command supports BNCI2014004; README says code for other datasets will be released.
Requires adapter to X.npy/labels.npy and local dependencies wandb/einops.
Hybrid cannot be scored until adapter is validated.
Repository dataset.py has BNCI2014001-4 branch but README says other dataset code to be released; dependency/preprocessed files missing.
Requires validated inverse-distance channel interpolation and EA behavior.
Hybrid cannot be scored until adapter is validated.
